basic_details.job_title: SECL Jr Technical Inspector Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 43 Posts
basic_details.short_information: South Eastern Coalfields Limited (SECL) has officially announced the Jr. Technical Inspector Recruitment 2026 with 43 openings. The detailed notification was published on 28 April 2026 at the official portal secl-cil.in. Candidates who meet the eligibility conditions (as per departmental rules) and hold a Graduate degree in Science with Chemistry in all three years/six semesters can now submit their online applications from 30 April 2026 to 20 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.details: Educational Qualification: Graduate in Science with Chemistry as a subject in all three years / six semesters. | Eligibility: | Any permanent Workmen/Employee of SECL with one year of service as on 31.03.2026. Only candidates who have studied Chemistry in all three years/six semesters are eligible. Employees working in higher grades are not eligible. Eligible corresponding grades/categories are mentioned in the notification. | Cut-off Date for Eligibility: 31.03.2026 | Other Conditions: | Minimum attendance criteria as per notification. ACR of 2024-25 should not be “Poor”. Candidates must upload all required documents (Degree + all Marksheets, Caste Certificate if applicable, etc.).

salary_details.pay_scale: As per SECL Cadre Scheme (T&S Grd-D)

selection_process: Mental Ability / Quantitative Ability / Logical & Reasoning 20
General Awareness & Knowledge regarding CIL/SECL, State (CG & MP) 20
Selection will be based on Written Examination only.
1 mark each) Duration: Not specified (OMR Sheet) No Negative Marking
Tie-Breaking Criteria: Date of Appointment → Date of Birth → Alphabetical Order of Name.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the SECL Internal Portal. No offline applications will be accepted.
Login with your credentials (or register if required).
Fill the online application form carefully.

Upload scanned copies of required documents (self-attested): Graduation Degree + All Marksheets (with Chemistry) Caste Certificate (for SC/ST) Recent Passport Size Photograph & Signature Any other relevant documents
Submit the application before the last date.
Take a printout of the submitted application for records.
Note: Unit HR Officer / Staff Officer (HR) will forward the applications after verification. Candidates can submit representation if rejected by Unit HR.
important_instructions: This is an internal recruitment — only permanent SECL departmental employees are eligible. Read the full notification and SOP carefully before applying. Upload clear, self-attested scanned copies of all documents. Incomplete or incorrect applications will be rejected. No change/correction is allowed after final submission. Selected candidates can be posted in any Area/Unit of SECL. All decisions of the Management regarding selection are final.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SECL Jr Technical Inspector Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for departmental employees to submit the online application for SECL Jr Technical Inspector T&S Grade‑D Recruitment 2026 is 20 May 2026 up to 11:59 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in SECL Jr Technical Inspector 2026?
faq.answer: South Eastern Coalfields Limited has announced a total of 43 vacancies for the post of Jr. Technical Inspector in T&S Grade‑D under this internal selection drive.

faq.question: Q3. Who is eligible to apply for SECL Jr Technical Inspector Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only permanent SECL departmental workmen and employees with at least one year of service as on 31 March 2026 and having a Science degree with Chemistry in all three years or six semesters are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q4. Is SECL Jr Technical Inspector Recruitment 2026 open for external candidates?
faq.answer: No, this Jr. Technical Inspector recruitment is an internal selection process and is open only to existing permanent employees of South Eastern Coalfields Limited; outsiders and contractual workers are not eligible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification for SECL Jr Technical Inspector T&S Grd‑D?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates in Science with Chemistry as a subject in each of the three years or all six semesters of their degree, and they must upload degree and mark sheets as proof.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for SECL Jr Technical Inspector Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based purely on an OMR‑based written examination of 100 objective questions, covering Chemistry and technical subject knowledge, reasoning and quantitative ability, and general awareness related to CIL, SECL and the states of Chhattisgarh and Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any negative marking in the SECL Jr Technical Inspector written exam?
faq.answer: No, there is no negative marking in the written test for Jr. Technical Inspector; each question carries one mark and no marks are deducted for wrong answers.

faq.question: Q8. What are the qualifying marks for SECL Jr Technical Inspector T&S Grade‑D exam?
faq.answer: General category employees need at least 40 percent marks in the written exam, while SC/ST employees must secure at least 30 percent marks to qualify for selection consideration.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for SECL Jr Technical Inspector Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for departmental employees to submit the online application for SECL Jr Technical Inspector T&S Grade‑D Recruitment 2026 is 20 May 2026 up to 11:59 PM.
